parameters.texts: ["It’s gotten so quiet... maybe I should start humming.","Hmm... hmm-mmh... hmm... Yeah, that’s terrible.","","Haha... it's all starting to look the same out here.","","...Is this the right path? I can't see where it ends.","","Still... if I go back now, will it be alright?","He said to “keep going!”","But what if there’s nothing ahead?","No signs. No guide. Just the weight of my thoughts.","At what point does doubt become insight?"]
